subcategory: Animated tab switcher with content panels
use_cases: Switching between multiple content sections with smooth animated transitions
Displaying feature comparisons or product details in tabbed layouts
Creating step-by-step onboarding flows or wizards
Organizing content-heavy pages into navigable sections
Building portfolio or gallery sections with tabbed categories
ai_summary: An animated tab navigation component with smooth framer-motion transitions between content panels. Each tab displays a grid layout with images and descriptive text. Supports customizable tab configurations with dark-themed styling and fluid morphing animations when switching between tabs. Ideal for organizing content into navigable sections on landing pages, dashboards, or product showcases.
